title: Durga, Kali, and the Matrikas Battle the Demon Raktabija: Scene from the Devi Mahatmya
description: Durga, Kali, and the Matrikas Battle the Demon Raktabija: Scene from the Devi Mahatmya — Gift of Subhash Kapoor, in memory of his parents, Smt Shashi Kanta and Shree Parshotam Ram Kapoor, 2008
